interfaces.name: getHomeOverview
interfaces.description: Get high-level overview content for the homepage, including capabilities, industries, and certifications.

interfaces.name: getHomePrimaryActions
interfaces.description: Get primary homepage call-to-action buttons to tools and key pages (RFQ, Cost Estimator, Lead Time Calculator, etc.).

interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get featured services and case studies to display on the homepage.

interfaces.name: getServiceCategoriesOverview
interfaces.description: Get the main service categories (e.g., CNC turning, 3-axis machining, 5-axis machining, prototyping, production runs) for the Services Overview page.

interfaces.name: getCapabilitiesFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available filter and sort options for the Capabilities & Processes listing page.

interfaces.name: searchServices
interfaces.description: Search and filter machining services for the Capabilities & Processes page.

max_tolerance_in.description: Maximum allowed ± tolerance in inches for the selected material

max_tolerance_mm.description: Maximum allowed ± tolerance in mm for the selected material

min_part_length_mm.description: Minimum required max_part_length_mm for the service

axes_min.description: Minimum number of axes (e.g., 5 to find 5-axis services)

is_active_only.description: If true, show only active services

interfaces.name: getServiceDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific machining service for the Service Detail page.

interfaces.name: getServiceRelatedCaseStudies
interfaces.description: Get case studies related to a specific service for display on the Service Detail page.

interfaces.name: getServiceInquiryFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and defaults for the Service Inquiry form, including the referenced service.

interfaces.name: submitServiceInquiry
interfaces.description: Submit a Service Inquiry form for a specific service.

interfaces.name: getRequestQuoteFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and any prefill data for the Request a Quote form, optionally based on a preferred cost estimate.

parameters.name: preferred_cost_estimate_id
parameters.description: If provided, use this CostEstimate to prefill material/quantity/surface finish.

interfaces.name: submitRequestQuote
interfaces.description: Submit the Request a Quote (RFQ) form for custom machined parts.

interfaces.name: getCostEstimatorFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration options for the Cost Estimator tool.

interfaces.name: calculateCostEstimate
interfaces.description: Calculate and persist a cost estimate for a given configuration in the Cost Estimator.

interfaces.name: setPreferredCostEstimate
interfaces.description: Mark a specific CostEstimate as the preferred configuration for quoting.

interfaces.name: getPreferredCostEstimate
interfaces.description: Get the currently preferred CostEstimate for the single user, if any.

interfaces.name: getCaseStudyFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Case Studies listing page.

interfaces.name: listCaseStudies
interfaces.description: List case studies with filters and sorting for the Case Studies page.

interfaces.name: getCaseStudyDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific case study for the Case Study Detail page.

details_body.description: Full narrative/details in rich text or HTML

interfaces.name: getSimilarProjectFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration and defaults for the 'Start a Similar Project' request form for a given case study.

interfaces.name: submitSimilarProjectRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a 'Start a Similar Project' request referencing a specific case study.

parameters.name: target_delivery_days
parameters.description: Desired delivery timeframe mentioned by user

interfaces.name: getEquipmentFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the Equipment Listing page.

interfaces.name: searchMachines
interfaces.description: Search and filter machines for the Equipment Listing page.

max_surface_roughness_ra_um.description: Maximum allowed Ra µm (e.g., 1.6 for Ra 1.6 µm or better)

interfaces.name: addMachineToComparison
interfaces.description: Add a machine to the active Equipment Comparison (creates comparison if needed).

interfaces.name: getCurrentEquipmentComparisonSummary
interfaces.description: Get the current active Equipment Comparison summary, including selected machines.

interfaces.name: getEquipmentComparisonDetails
interfaces.description: Get full comparison details for selected machines on the Equipment Comparison page.

interfaces.name: saveAndEmailEquipmentComparison
interfaces.description: Save an equipment comparison and optionally email it to the provided address while staying on the comparison page.

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: Optional label for this saved comparison

parameters.name: email
parameters.description: If provided, send the comparison summary to this email

interfaces.name: getAboutUsContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About Us page including history, mission, certifications, industries served, and differentiators.

interfaces.name: getVisitPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the Visit Our Facility page: guidelines, safety requirements, tour types.

interfaces.name: getPlantTourFormConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the plant tour scheduling form, including time slot options and date constraints.

min_selectable_date.description: ISO date for earliest selectable tour date

max_selectable_date.description: ISO date for latest selectable tour date

interfaces.name: submitPlantTourRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a plant tour/visit scheduling request.

parameters.name: visit_date
parameters.description: Selected date in ISO format (date or datetime)

interfaces.name: getProductFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get category, price, material, and finish filter options for the Products Catalog.

interfaces.name: listProducts
interfaces.description: List standard catalog products for the Products Catalog with filters and sorting.

interfaces.name: getProductDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details of a catalog product for the Product Detail page.

interfaces.name: addToCart
interfaces.description: Add a catalog product to the cart (creates cart if needed).

item_count.description: Total number of line items in the cart

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current cart contents for the Cart page.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a cart item and recalculate totals.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove a cart item and recalculate cart totals.

interfaces.name: getLeadTimeCalculatorConfig
interfaces.description: Get configuration for the Lead Time Calculator, including available processes and shipping methods.

interfaces.name: calculateLeadTimeOptions
interfaces.description: Calculate lead-time options (production + shipping) for a given quantity and selected processes.

interfaces.name: selectLeadTimeOption
interfaces.description: Select a specific lead-time option as the chosen shipping/service level for a calculation.

interfaces.name: getLeadTimeSummary
interfaces.description: Get the summary of a lead-time calculation, including selected option, for the Lead Time Calculator summary section.

helperFunctions.name: _generateId
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to generate unique ids for new entities like RequestQuote, CostEstimate, PlantTourRequest, etc.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the current open Cart for the single user or create one if none exists.

helperFunctions.name: _recalculateCartTotals
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to recalculate cart subtotal and update Cart after changes to CartItems.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateActiveEquipmentComparison
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single active EquipmentComparison for the current user.

helperFunctions.name: _markSelectedLeadTimeOption
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to set one LeadTimeOption.is_selected=true for a calculation and others to false.
